transcript: with you i tried to be perfect and keep you happy all the time but i didn't know that you wanted somebody else now i don't want nothing to do with you it's all right it's okay i don't need you anyway so let me be i'm doing fine don't you waste your precious time i don't want want you back no you'll hurt hurt me bad it's all right it's okay it's all right i did everything for you even though you gave me nothing back i guess that i wasn't
